# WHAT: 04-evidence

**Slide type:** information
**Section:** Evidence

## Top-level outcome
Audience believes the architecture produces measurable ROI, based on visible data.

## L1
Teams that adopted this pattern shipped faster and spent less — with numbers.

## L2
- Inline SVG bar chart showing velocity improvement (before vs after)
- One-line case study blurb with named teams
- No logos, no marketing language

## Verification criteria
- SVG has `viewBox` (not fixed width/height)
- Data source cited in speaker notes
- Action title is an assertion with a number
